01 · How It Works

Clear Analysis. Smarter Decisions.

No fluff, no affiliate links, no hidden agendas. The highest spec is rarely the best value — we show you exactly what you need and why.

01

We Research

Our team tests, benchmarks, and analyses the latest technology — from laptops to smart home gear — without manufacturer influence.

02

We Distil

Every finding is condensed into clear, actionable intelligence. No jargon. No padding. Just the insight you need to decide.

03

You Decide

Receive your weekly report, browse the library anytime, and buy tech with confidence — knowing you've got the full picture.

Free Weekly Newsletter

Stay Ahead of the Hype

02 · Reports Library

20 Reports at Launch. 6 Categories. All Honest.

Six core topic areas. 20 reports at launch, growing weekly. Everything archived and searchable for subscribers.

🎧

Audio & Wearables

Blind listening tests, ANC measurement, smartwatch comparisons.

📷

Cameras & Monitors

Panel testing, colour accuracy, real-world photo comparisons.

⚡

Accessories & Peripherals

Keyboards, docks, chargers, cables — the small purchases that matter.
